---
title: "GGplot"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-14"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
data <- read_csv("height_data_clean.csv") %>%
  mutate(survey_date = as.Date(survey_date))

```


## Plot height over time for each population

```{r}
height_trend <- data %>%
  group_by(survey_date, pop) %>%
  summarise(avg_height_cm = mean(height_cm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(height_trend, aes(x = survey_date, y = avg_height_cm, color = pop)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Height Over Time by Population",
    x = "Survey Date",
    y = "Average Height (cm)",
    color = "Population"
  )
```

## Keep only January 27, 2023

```{r}
jan27_data <- data %>%
  filter(survey_date == as.Date("2023-01-27"))
```

## Boxplot for each population on January 27, 2023

```{r}
ggplot(jan27_data, aes(x = pop, y = height_cm, fill = pop)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Height Distribution by Population on January 27, 2023",
    x = "Population",
    y = "Height (cm)"

    )
```
